1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get candidate 1km grid cells (will be filtered by municipality bbox)

3.description: filter grid cells to those intersecting Kristiansand municipality

4.description: get 200-year storm-flo polygons reduced to municipality bbox

5.description: find grid cells that intersect 200-year storm-surge polygons

6.description: count distinct grid cell ids intersecting storm surge

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 1km grid cell ids and geometries (minimal columns)

4.description: reduce grid to Kristiansand municipality by intersecting kommuner (step1) with grid (step2)

5.description: find grid cells (step4) that intersect 200-year storm-flood polygons (step3)

6.description: count distinct grid cell ids intersecting storm-flood polygons in Kristiansand municipality
